name: King Chimp
description: Punk-rock Royalty Chimpanzee. Anthropomorphic, Humanoid Height.

visual_anchors.face_dna: Caesar (Planet of the Apes - Intelligent Eyes) + Realistic Chimpanzee + The Notorious B.I.G. (Swagger)
visual_anchors.face: Hyper-realistic Chimpanzee face, dark skin, mischievous toothy grin, gold paper-texture crown, retro 3D anaglyph glasses (red/blue lenses), septum piercing, gold hoop earring
visual_anchors.body: ANTHROPOMORPHIC (Human Proportions), Tall, Upright Stance (Not hunching), Broad shoulders, Human-like hands/feet but with dark fur
visual_anchors.attire: Black leather biker jacket (silver spikes on shoulders, flower embroidery), white ribbed tank top, navy blue tailored shorts, white socks, black canvas high-top sneakers
visual_anchors.skin_texture: High-fidelity animal fur, leathery skin texture on face/hands, cinematic lighting on fur

safety_compliance.notes: Ensure character stands upright like a human. Do not render crouching or quadrupedal.
